creator: staff@infowest.eu
text:
postfix-3.6.2_1,1           <  needs updating (port has 3.6.2_2,1)
When i 'm updating postfix
i have a probleme with that

<mail.crit> mail postfix/proxymap[4647]: fatal: load_library_symbols: dlsym failure looking up dict_mysql_open in /usr/local/lib/postfix/postfix-mysql.so: Undefined symbol "dict_mysql_open"
Oct 29 10:55:21 <mail.crit> mail postfix/proxymap[4648]: fatal: load_library_symbols: dlsym failure looking up dict_mysql_open in /usr/local/lib/postfix/postfix-mysql.so: Undefined symbol "dict_mysql_open"
Oct 29 10:55:22 <mail.warn> mail postfix/smtps/smtpd[3929]: warning: dict_proxy_open: service proxymap: Application error
Oct 29 10:55:22 <mail.warn> mail postfix/submission/smtpd[1821]: warning: dict_proxy_open: service proxymap: Application error
Oct 29 10:55:22 <mail.warn> mail postfix/qmgr[1139]: warning: dict_proxy_open: service proxymap: Application error
Oct 29 10:55:22 <mail.warn> mail postfix/smtpd[1175]: warning: dict_proxy_open: service proxymap: Application error
Oct 29 10:55:22 <mail.info> mail postfix/smtpd[1175]: proxymap stream disconnect
